Ntc And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Nov-27-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Jeremy Parternak, Esq., 415-693-0300, moving to be relieved as counsel for plaintiff PATICIA HOFF
Robert Shwarts, Esq. of Orrick, Herrington & Sutcliffe, 415-773-5760 for defendant and opposing party Trentwest Resorts Inc.

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court GRANTED Jeremy Parternak, Esq.'s Notice And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel for PLAINTIFF PATICIA HOFF. AN IN CAMERA HEARING WAS CONDUCTED BETWEEN MOVING PARTY AND THE COURT AFTER HEARING DEFENDANT'S OPPOSITION TO THE MOTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
